global_prereq_task_ids: INFRA-01, INFRA-02, INFRA-03, INFRA-04, INFRA-05, INFRA-06, INFRA-07, INFRA-08, INFRA-09, UX-01, QA-01
workflow_tasklist: T01: Confirm template is `published` and has a readiness row/version aligned with the executing template ID/version. || T02: Start via `POST /workflows/start` using `template_id` + `template_version`; capture execution ID and baseline status. || T03: Verify execution transitions out of `pending` after edge-function callback and records step history entries. || T04: Validate `GET /workflows/executions/{id}` and `GET /workflows/executions/{id}/events` emit consistent status/history transitions. || T05: Validate terminal outcome (completed / waiting_approval / failed with actionable error) and persisted outcome summary/history artifacts. || T06: Add or update an automated integration test covering nominal start + one critical path assertion for this workflow. || T07: Force/observe `waiting_approval` in a nominal run and confirm the gate is surfaced as expected. || T08: Validate `POST /workflows/executions/{id}/approve` resumes execution and records approval history/message. || T09: Validate frontend approval UX path (active execution view) renders gate state and can approve without desync. || T10: Validate autonomous mode semantics mark the gate as human-required (`PASS_AUTONOMOUS_WITH_GATES`) rather than silently stalling. || T11: Validate generated analyses/dashboards/queries have schema-consistent outputs and deterministic step inputs/outputs in execution history. || T12: Add this workflow to the post-fix exhaustive audit allowlist/pacing batch and record evidence refs.
verification_task: Re-run in strict E2E env and verify status path `pending/running -> waiting_approval -> running/completed` with SSE + approval endpoint + UI path.
definition_of_done: Direct `/workflows/start` returns 200 in strict E2E env ; Execution leaves `pending` and emits history/SSE events ; Workflow reaches `completed` or valid gate with actionable state ; No critical-step simulation fallback in strict mode ; Approval endpoint + UI path verified end-to-end

definition_of_done: Direct `/workflows/start` returns 200 in strict E2E env ; Execution leaves `pending` and emits history/SSE events ; Workflow reaches `completed` or valid gate with actionable state ; No critical-step simulation fallback in strict mode
